en.summary: This hadith, narrated through a chain reaching the companion Jabir ibn Abdillah al-Ansari, records the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) publicly proclaiming from the pulpit in Medina before the assembled Muhajirun and Ansar that whoever harbors hatred for the Ahlul Bayt will be resurrected on the Day of Judgment as a Jew — even if he outwardly professed the shahada. The Prophet further stated that such a person would become a follower of the Dajjal. He also revealed that Allah showed him the entire Ummah in primordial clay and that he specifically prayed for Ali and his followers. Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq (AS) confirmed the hadith’s authenticity while expressing surprise that his father (Imam al-Baqir) had shared it.

key_terms.أَهْلَ البَيْتِ: Ahlul Bayt — the household of the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW), specifically referring to the Prophet, Ali, Fatima, Hasan, and Husayn and the Imams from their progeny
key_terms.الدَّجَّالَ: The Dajjal — the false messiah (Antichrist) who will appear near the end of times as a great trial for believers
key_terms.المُهَاجِرِينَ: The Muhajirun — the early Muslims who emigrated from Mecca to Medina
key_terms.الأَنْصَار: The Ansar — the Muslim residents of Medina who supported the Prophet
key_terms.الجِزْيَة: The jizyah — a tax paid by non-Muslims living under Islamic governance
key_terms.شِيعَتِهِ: His Shia — the followers and partisans of Imam Ali (AS)

en.seo_question: What did the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) say about those who hate the Ahlul Bayt?

ur.summary: یہ حدیث صحابی جابر بن عبداللہ انصاری سے مروی ہے جس میں نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم نے اہل بیت سے بغض رکھنے والوں کے بارے میں فرمایا۔
ur.seo_question: اہل بیت سے بغض رکھنے والوں کے بارے میں نبی کریم نے کیا فرمایا؟

tr.summary: Bu hadis, Hz. Peygamber'in Ehl-i Beyt'e buğzedenlerin kıyamet gününde Yahudi olarak diriltileceğini ilân ettiğini kaydeder.
tr.seo_question: Hz. Peygamber Ehl-i Beyt'e buğzedenler hakkında ne buyurmuştur?

fa.summary: این حدیث از صحابی جابر بن عبداللہ انصاری روایت شده است.
fa.seo_question: پیامبر اکرم درباره کسانی که از اهل بیت نفرت دارند چه فرمودند؟

id.summary: Hadis ini meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi Muhammad (SAWW) menyatakan siapa pun yang membenci Ahlul Bait akan dibangkitkan sebagai Yahudi.
id.seo_question: Apa yang dikatakan Nabi Muhammad tentang mereka yang membenci Ahlul Bait?

bn.summary: এই হাদীস আহলে বাইতের প্রতি বিদ্বেষ পোষণকারীদের পরিণতি সম্পর্কে নবীর ঘোষণা বর্ণনা করে।
bn.seo_question: আহলে বাইতের প্রতি বিদ্বেষ পোষণকারীদের সম্পর্কে নবী কী বলেছেন?

es.summary: Este hadiz registra la proclamación del Profeta Muhammad (SAWW) de que quien odie a los Ahlul Bayt será resucitado como judío.
es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta Muhammad sobre quienes odian a los Ahlul Bayt?

fr.summary: Ce hadith rapporte la proclamation du Prophète Muhammad (SAWW) que quiconque déteste les Ahl al-Bayt sera ressuscité comme juif.
fr.seo_question: Que dit le Prophète Muhammad au sujet de ceux qui détestent les Ahl al-Bayt ?

de.summary: Dieser Hadith berichtet die Verkündigung des Propheten Muhammad (SAWW) dass wer die Ahlul Bayt hasst, am Tag des Gerichts als Jude auferweckt werde.
de.seo_question: Was sagte der Prophet Muhammad über diejenigen, die die Ahlul Bayt hassen?

ru.summary: Этот хадис содержит провозглашение Пророка Мухаммада о ненавидящих Ахль аль-Байт.
ru.seo_question: Что сказал Пророк Мухаммад о тех, кто ненавидит Ахль аль-Байт?

zh.summary: 这段圣训记录了先知穆罕默德宣告仇恨圣裔者将在复活日作为犹太人被复活。
zh.seo_question: 先知穆罕默德对仇恨圣裔者说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو الْحُسَيْنِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُظَفَّرِ الْبَزَّازُ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِيُّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِدْرِيسُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ الْكَفَرْثُوثِيُّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَنَانُ بْنُ سَدِيرٍ، عَنْ سُدَيْفٍ الْمَكِّيِّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلَامُ وَمَا رَأَيْتُ مُحَمَّدِيًّا قَطُّ يَعْدِلُهُ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي جَابِرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْأَنْصَارِيُّ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: نَادَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي الْمُهَاجِرِينَ وَالْأَنْصَارِ، فَحَضَرُوا بِالسِّلَاحِ وَصَعِدَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ الْمِنْبَرَ، فَحَمِدَ اللَّهَ وَأَثْنَى عَلَيْهِ، ثُمَّ قَالَ: يَا مَعَاشِرَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ مَنْ أَبْغَضَنَا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ يَهُودِيًّا.

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو الْحُسَيْنِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُظَفَّرِ الْبَزَّازُ
narrators.name_en: Abul Husayn Muhammad ibn al-Muzaffar al-Bazzaz

narrators.name_en: Abu Abdillah Ja'far ibn Muhammad al-Hasani

narrators.ambiguity_note: Known by his nisbah to Kafarthuth, limited biographical information available

key_phrases.phrase_en: the People of the House (Ahlul Bayt)
There is no god but Allah
May Allah's blessings be upon him and his family

similar_content_hints.description: A hadith in al-Kafi about the necessity of loving and following the Ahlul Bayt as a condition of true faith.
Narrations about the Prophet being shown his entire Ummah and knowing them individually, paralleling the Quranic account of Adam being taught all names.
Hadiths about the Prophet specifically praying for Ali and his followers (Shia), found in various hadith collections.
